relationships.relationship_description: LTA licenses SMRT Corporation to operate major MRT lines.

source_metadata.evidence_original: SMRT Corporation operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: SMRT Corporation operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.

relationships.relationship_description: MOT supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding.

source_metadata.evidence_original: The Ministry of Transport (MOT) supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: The Ministry of Transport (MOT) supervises LTA and allocates annual budgetary funding.

relationships.relationship_description: NEA works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards.

source_metadata.evidence_original: The National Environment Agency (NEA) works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: The National Environment Agency (NEA) works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators.

relationships.relationship_description: LTA collaborates with Grab Singapore on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs but has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs but has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.

relationships.relationship_description: CAS submits policy feedback to MOT and advocates for passenger rights.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT. CAS has criticized fare increases and service disruptions.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT. CAS has criticized fare increases and service disruptions.

pain_points.painpoint: Grab has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs but has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs but has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.

pain_points.painpoint: CAS has criticized fare increases and service disruptions.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT. CAS has criticized fare increases and service disruptions.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT. CAS has criticized fare increases and service disruptions.

pain_points.painpoint: Testing site approval process takes too long, severely delaying R&D progress.

source_metadata.evidence_original: 土地交通局（LTA）与新加坡科技公司合作开发无人驾驶巴士项目，但该公司反映测试场地审批流程过长，严重延误了研发进度。
source_metadata.evidence_translated: LTA collaborated with a Singaporean tech firm to develop autonomous bus projects, but the company reported that testing site approval processes took too long, severely delaying R&D progress.
